title: Red Dinosaur
description: Say welcome to a new mob ( Red Dinosaur ) !
body:
![Red Dinosaur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bce5965dc06759f17d61b3ab3b60c528ff83e160.png)

Introducing the Red Dinosaur mod, which will give you a new and simple experience with your new friend (the Red Dinosaur).

You can find this dinosaur randomly in the jungle. This dinosaur is looking for a friend to protect and feed it, and that friend is definitely you!

Simply feed it sweet berries to tame it, and then it will become your friend, its purpose being to defend you from all monsters.

The mod also provides the Red Shell item, which allows you to craft red blocks, among the strongest blocks in the game. You can use these blocks to build houses that won't explode and that other players can't easily destroy, unlike obsidian.

Therefore, I advise you to have a new experience with the red dinosaur and embark on wonderful adventures.
